Qualcomm Inc (QCOM) — Fiscal Q1 2026 Earnings Call Transcript (First-Hand)

Financial Results (Quarter ended Dec 2025):
- Revenue: $12.8B (+18% YoY, +5% QoQ)
- QCT Revenue: $10.9B (+20% YoY)
  - Handsets: $7.8B (+12%)
  - Automotive: $1.2B (+58%)
  - IoT: $1.9B (+26%)
- QTL Revenue: $1.9B (+8%)
- Non-GAAP EPS: $3.42 (+22%)

AI / Edge AI Highlights:
- Snapdragon X Elite shipped 15M units since launch
- AI PC TAM penetration: 22% of new Windows PCs (vs 8% prior year)
- Snapdragon 8 Elite (3nm): 45+ TOPS, adopted by Samsung Galaxy S26
- On-device AI inference: 70B parameter models running locally on Snapdragon X
- Qualcomm AI Hub: 250+ optimized models in the ecosystem

Automotive:
- Design win pipeline: $45B lifetime value (+30% YoY)
- Snapdragon Ride Flex: L2+ to L4 unified SoC
- New wins: BMW, Mercedes (cockpit + ADAS), BYD (全栈智驾)
- Snapdragon Digital Chassis revenue from GM, Hyundai ramping

CEO Cristiano Amon:
"Edge AI is the next major computing platform shift. We are positioned at the intersection of mobile, automotive, and PC — all transitioning to on-device AI inference. The Snapdragon X platform proves that AI PCs are not a concept, they're shipping at scale."

Guidance Q2 FY2026:
- Revenue: $12.9-$13.5B
- Non-GAAP EPS: $3.45-$3.65

Data Date: 2026-01-29 (Q1 FY2026 Earnings)
